title: Top Gainers & Losers on Mar 06: Tejas Networks, LT Foods, Vedant Fashions, ICICI Bank, HPCL, among top losers
summary: The Indian stock market continued its decline, with the Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex dropping 1.20% and 1.39% respectively, amid worsening tensions in the Middle East. All sectoral indices fell, with Nifty Realty losing the most at 2%. Investor sentiment remains fragile due to ongoing conflict.

title: Maharatna oil PSU IOC declares  ₹2 per share dividend. Record date, income tax compliance, other details
summary: Indian Oil Corporation announced a 20% interim dividend of  ₹2 per share for FY 2025-26, to be paid by April 5, 2026. The record date for eligibility is set for March 12, 2026.

title: Why did United Spirits, Radico Khaitan and other liquor stocks gain up to 7% despite stock market crash? Explained
summary: Liquor stocks surged up to 8% after Karnataka's government announced a shift to global taxation and deregulation of alcohol pricing in its state budget. The new excise structure, effective April 2026, will modernize the framework and enhance transparency, targeting alcohol content for taxation.

title: Nifty-gold ratio falls near 1.5: What does it signal about gold and equities? What should investors do?
summary: The Nifty-to-gold ratio has declined to near 1.5. On several occasions in the past, when the Nifty-to-gold ratio dropped below the 2.5 mark, it was followed by a healthy upside in the Nifty 50.

title: Stock market strategy amid US-Iran war: Kotak Equities adds Groww, Swiggy to model portfolio
summary: Kotak reports that India's market is hindered by high valuations and geopolitical tensions. The brokerage anticipates growth for Nifty 50, while making changes in its portfolio, including favouring Groww and addressing concerns about Swiggy's competitiveness in the food delivery sector.

title: Rajputana Stainless IPO to open next week; GMP, price band, review, other key details
summary: Rajputana Stainless IPO price band is set at  ₹116 to  ₹122 per share, and the IPO lot size for an application is 110 shares. The minimum investment amount required by a retail investor is  ₹13,420.

title: Market overshadowed by global events, but foundation for long-term wealth creation intact, says Prime Wealth co-founder
summary: Despite market volatility, Prime Wealth's co-founder insists the economic foundation for long-term wealth creation remains strong. Key triggers, such as oil prices and foreign flows, could impact the market's trajectory this year.

title: India's growth story not fading; stock market gradually repricing uncertainty, says Equitree Capital co-founder, CEO
summary: Equitree Capital's co-founder discusses the market's volatility and the importance of strategic investment amidst changing valuations. He says the India growth story is not fading, but a valuation and expectation reset is happening after a period of exceptional re-rating.

title: SuperHealth bets honesty, light assets will power its out-patient hospital model
summary: By decoupling real estate from care delivery, SuperHealth Hospital hopes to offer affordable VIP care.

title: How SEBI’s new PMS rules offer a solution to the long-standing problem for HNI portfolios, family wealth
summary: What happens if the head of the household goes away? What if the PMS house that takes care of the money wants to change things up or sell its business? What happens to the portfolio when the individual who made the money is no longer there?

title: More women among next gen investors? Marcellus outlines trends from India’s new investment landscape
summary: Indian women are experiencing a significant transformation, excelling in education and increasingly participating in the workforce and entrepreneurship. This rise in financial independence is making them influential investors, with growing bank account ownership and stronger credit behavior than men, signaling profound implications for India's economy.

title: Sedemac Mechatronics IPO subscribed 2.7x on final day; GMP falls sharply. Check details
summary: Sedemac Mechatronics IPO GMP today was - ₹18, meaning that shares were trading at a discount to the offer price. At the current GMP, Sedemac Mechatronics IPO listing price could be  ₹1334, down 1.33%.

title: What Iran really means for markets
summary: From inflation and interest rates to a stock market reshuffling and the federal deficit, this war could have far-reaching financial effects. Investing moves to consider.

title: US-Iran war: How is the Middle East conflict shaping India's bond market?
summary: Bond markets are expected to be stable amid the crude oil shock as the RBI and government will work together to minimise the impact by keeping easy liquidity and tapping into their strategic oil reserve, opine experts.

title: Uber eyes $13 billion intercity travel market with AbhiBus tie-up
summary: Challenging redBus’s dominance, Uber has integrated AbhiBus into its app to capture the under-penetrated intercity travel market without the cost of a full-stack rollout.

title: AI layoffs 2026: From Oracle to Amazon, these tech companies cut over 35,000 jobs so far this year
summary: Job cuts continue in the global tech sector, with over 35,000 layoffs in 2026 alone. Companies such as Oracle, Amazon, and Nike have significantly reduced their workforce.&nbsp;

title: Will gold build on its 2025 spectacular gains? Ways to invest in yellow metal in 2026
summary: Gold ETFs and FoFs provide digital ownership with no storage and insurance costs, ease of buying and selling, etc. Gold coins and bullion provide tangible ownership with immediate possession, while gold jewellery serves investment and consumption needs.

title: Oil marketing companies, paint stocks decline amid surging crude oil prices
summary: Shares of oil marketing companies ended lower on Friday after a day's breather amid surging crude oil prices due to the deepening conflict in West Asia.

title: Nithin Kamath suggests how to curb offshore betting apps mushrooming after real money gaming ban
summary: Following India’s ban on real-money online gaming, offshore betting apps are rapidly growing. Nithin Kamath warns they target Indian users, raise fraud risks, and suggests blocking domestic payment access to curb their spread.

title: Bharat Forge, Bharat Electronics among 7 stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 25% in a month
summary: The Sensex fell sharply by 1,097 points to close at 78,918 on Friday. Despite the broad market decline, seven BSE 200 stocks touched 52-week highs, signaling strong momentum and investor optimism for further potential gains.

summary: US stock market futures indicate a lower opening on March 6, driven by ongoing Middle East tensions. Despite this, US equities have shown resilience compared to significant losses in Asian markets, as investors reassess strategies amid concerns of a potential global economic slowdown.

title: Crude oil rallies on intensifying US‑Iran conflict, set for largest weekly gain since 2022
summary: The US-Iran conflict has caused a significant spike in crude oil prices, with Brent crude rising 22% this week. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupts global energy supplies, prompting warnings that prices could reach $150 per barrel if disruptions continue.

title: Flipkart layoffs 2026: Nearly 500 employees asked to leave after performance review, says report
summary: Flipkart has asked 400-500 employees, about 3-4% of its workforce, to leave based on performance reviews, according to a report. Here's what we know.&nbsp;
